nodes.name: Manual Trigger (Webhook)
nodes.notes: POST { client_id, target_urls: [...], user_id } to trigger manually

nodes.name: Bishop — Scrape Leads
nodes.notes: Replace mock data with real scraper (Clay.ai / Apollo.io / custom)

nodes.name: Pawn — Verify & Dedup
nodes.notes: Calls pawn-verify edge function. Returns { clean, duplicates, invalid, stats }

nodes.name: Bishop — Generate Drafts
nodes.notes: Calls bishop-sweep — generates AI email drafts for all eligible leads

nodes.name: Bishop — Send Emails
nodes.notes: Calls bishop-send for each pending draft

nodes.name: Queen — Slack Report
nodes.notes: Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL in n8n environment variables

_readme.description: Bishop full pipeline: scrape → pawn dedup/verify → bishop-sweep drafts → bishop-send emails → Queen Slack report

environment_variables.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: Supabase service role key (from project settings)
environment_variables.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: Incoming webhook URL for #regent-reports Slack channel
environment_variables.BISHOP_AUTO_SEND: Set to 'true' for autonomous sending. Leave unset for human-review (PILOT mode)

_readme.how_to_import: In n8n: Workflows → Import from file → select this JSON
_readme.pilot_mode: BISHOP_AUTO_SEND is NOT set → drafts saved to ai_drafts table for human approval in the Regent dashboard
_readme.auto_mode: BISHOP_AUTO_SEND=true → emails sent automatically without human review
